raw_text: I had initially ordered a wireless Bluetooth device and the payment was successfully deducted. After some time, I received a message that the order had been cancelled and the refund would be processed. Therefore, I placed the order again and received the second order successfully. However, about 10 minutes later, another delivery partner arrived with the first order. Since I had already received the second order, I did not accept the first one. The delivery partner informed me that he would

Blinkit is a great app with a wide variety of products and quick ordering experience. However, I have faced several issues with the delivery service. Sometimes the location shown to the delivery partner is incorrect, and despite explaining the situation, the delivery partner is often unwilling to cooperate. This can be very frustrating, especially when the order contains items that are urgently needed. While the app itself is excellent and easy to use, my experience with delivery is worst

The customer care service is poor. I ordered an item and it was defective. I returned it, but the refund is not yet initiated. There's no customer care helpline number that you can access. I tried to get my issue solved by the AI window for customer service, but it's saying that the refund will be done by 2nd June. But it's not yet initiated.

Please don't buy electronic products from here. They refuse to take accountability for the defective products and deflect the complaints to the respective brand service centers. You'll be much better off shopping from the local dealers, especially if you are buying gaming consoles / controllers.

I ordered 2 Paper Boat Aam Panna drinks, but there was a glitch in the app that caused issues with my order. Additionally, I have never installed the Blanket application, which makes the situation even more confusing. This was a frustrating experience, and I hope the issue is resolved quickly.

Non trust worthy app I ordered few groceries correctly but they delivered a wrong product so when I have connected to the mail address provided for delivery issue now they are saying that any returns or replacements once an order has been successfully delivered. mistake was done by user delivery guys end why I should face the consequences of not have the right product on time when needed and loss of my money as paid money 3 times of the the wrong product delivered.

The delivery agent did not deliver the order for over 30 mins and i finally had to cancel the order, there was no option of leaving a review as well. the customer service agent took the easy option of confirming that i wanted to cancel the order and offered no option to email me any confirmation of actions taken against the delivery executive

Sends opened packages for items (never sealed), which again are mostly smelly. Disappointing customer service. All items received are mostly dirty, including edibles. Don't know how and where they store it and in what condition. Get items opened and missing. Worst part, they never acknowledge their mistakes and say the Level 1 team can't take decisions. How clueless and ignorant are these guys? They don't even wanna rectify their issues.

Very disappointed. Three of the products ordered were not delivered at all. I paid already. When I contacted the customer service number, I got a response stating that all products were delivered which is a lie. I want a refund. Please do the needful. Blinkit in Coimbatore location. I never expected this kind of breach of conduct. I have proof too.

Don't order from Blinkit at all. Last time I placed an order and there was no information. They just picked up and took all the stuff and I still haven't received my payment refund. Please don't order from anyone. It's not good, Blinkit

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I urgently needed a Type-C charger and relied on the app's search results, which showed a charger that turned out to be Type-B. While the correct description may have been listed, customers in urgent situations often rely on search results to find the right product quickly. After opening the package to verify the connector type, customer support refused a replacement. It's my hard-earned money, and I regret this purchase.

worst delivery application there is no point of sending an email if you are going to say that "we cannot help" you took extra money as surcharge from me and then delivered the product 30 min late which was already schedule for 20 mins. if you are going to send a product in 50 mins then there is no point of showing the estimated time as 20 mins.

The app is perfect of last minute items and when uninvited guests arrive. the delivery is really fast like in a blink as its name. the items are a bit expensive but the faster delivery compensate it and also we don't have to leave our house. also there's a lot of variety of items available so it's overall best app.

Absolutely unacceptable experience. I ordered items through your app, and one of the products was missing from the delivery. When I reached out via the help chat, I was kept waiting with no proper response, and after all that delay, I was simply told that the item was “thoroughly checked" and not missing, and that nothing could be done. If this is how customer complaints are handled, I seriously question the reliability of your platform. Very disappointed.

One of my friends ordered articles on Blinkit... He cancelled the order over a call from Blinkit. But on the order page it's showing that the article has been delivered and there has been no refund yet. The worst part is that You can neither call the customer care nor there is an option to raise queries of your choice other than the listed queries with the chatbot. This has been the worst experience with a delivery partner till date

Blinkit does not seem reliable when it comes to refunds. A few days ago, I ordered 8 products from Blinkit, but for some reason, I received only 7 items. I immediately reported the missing product, and their support team assured me that I would get a refund. Today is the 1st May, and the app is showing that the refund has already been processed to my account, but I still have not received any money.

"I had a bad experience with Blinkit. I ordered a L’Oréal shampoo, but by mistake I selected the wrong product. Immediately, I tried to modify the order, but it showed that the process had already started. Then I tried to cancel it, but there was no option for that either. At least there should be an option to modify the order. How is it possible that within just one second the order was already processed and out for delivery?"

Even one star is very high rating for the behaviour I have faced at customer service of Blinkit. I ordered an item because I was in hurry and had to leave the place. But the seal of the item was broken and it was rotting inside. The only option they gave is to refund after pickup. How am I supposed to stay there for pickup when the onoy reason I ordered because I was in hurry to leave. And now there is no option for refund and I'm stuck with a rotten item.

customer service assistance is very very poor and irresponsible.When you actually need support and assistance about the product you already purchase but there is some issues related to product like wrong product delivered,actual product differ as shown in app they never assist you and you can write about your query as desired option is not listed.Any emergency support number is also not available. Do smart shopping always not ruined your time,energy and wise money on such apps who don't assist.

poor service. I have ordered products from this app. At the time of order it shows an estimated delivery time of 18 minutes. I am waiting from 50 minutes but the order was not delivered yet. when I call the help desk no. no one is picking my call and in app delivery status is showing already delivered in 24 minutes. No response I got from the app. worst service
